title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at India Tourism Development Corporation

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at India Tourism Development Corporation
jsonLd.description:
India Tourism Development Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Tourism Development Corporation:
India Tourism Development Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Tourism Development Corporation!
